description: Active spec sync in finish agent, brainstorm templates for all platforms
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(templates): finish agent now actively syncs spec docs during pipeline runs — injects `update-spec.md` into finish context across all pipeline platforms (claude/iflow/opencode), rewrites finish workflow from passive verification to active spec sync that detects new patterns/contracts and updates spec files before confirming PR readiness
- feat(templates): add brainstorm command to all 5 platform templates (claude/iflow/opencode/cursor/codex) with platform-specific command syntax — previously only existed in deployed dirs, never generated by `trellis init/update`

**Documentation:**
- docs(templates): update dispatch.md across claude/iflow/opencode to document the new finish-phase spec injection (update-spec.md + finish-work.md + prd.md)
- docs(templates): update finish-work.md block rule — pipeline platforms note automatic spec sync by finish agent, non-pipeline platforms (cursor/codex) retain manual-first wording
- docs(templates): add brainstorm references to start commands across iflow/opencode/cursor/codex — adds Complex Task classification, brainstorm-first workflow section, and command table entry (matching existing Claude start.md)
- docs(codex): restore code-spec enforcement sections (Section 2.5 Hard Block) in codex skill templates that were missing from initial codex integration
notes: No migration required. Template-level changes only — run `trellis update` to sync.
